name: falso-raycast
title: Falso
description: Falso Raycast extension for local fake data generation.
author: jorggerojas

commands.name: generate
commands.title: Generate Fake Data
commands.description: Generate one fake value or a short batch.

commands.description: Build a local JSON payload from enabled fields.

commands.title: Manage Config
commands.description: View and update local config values.
